lanes.goal: select the highest-leverage v8.0 direction after v7.9 externalization readiness
lanes.expected_output: approved v8.0 externalized organization runtime direction
lanes.stop_condition: stop if no bounded first slice can be selected

lanes.goal: prevent v8.0 from overclaiming provider execution, secrets, deploy, billing, production writes, or semantic truth
lanes.expected_output: explicit authority and not-proven boundary for v8.0
lanes.stop_condition: stop if v8.0 is framed as autonomous external execution

join_packet.blocker_summary: no active blocker after Council bounded the release scope
join_packet.merge_rationale: value and boundary lanes agree that v8.0 should implement external resource contract and audit before provider adapter automation

not_proven: Parallel lane direction evidence does not prove implementation completeness or external provider execution.
